signals.headline: **Bitcoin surge and ETF inflows:** Large-scale Bitcoin purchases by Strategy and nearly $1B weekly inflows into US spot
signals.raw: **Bitcoin surge and ETF inflows:** Large-scale Bitcoin purchases by Strategy and nearly $1B weekly inflows into US spot Bitcoin ETFs as of April 22, signaling institutional momentum amid Q1 volatility (YTD BTC down 19%).[5]
